title: sheeta's Armor Hud
description: Minimalist vanilla-like HUD widget to display your armor and Trinket items with their durability. Forked by sheeta.
body:
# sheeta's Armor HUD
![hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dae0917dc7570315f6bce4a83d2a861e36fc9164.png)

This mod adds a minimalist vanilla-like widget that shows your armor items, along with dedicated slots for the [Charm of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm-of-undying) and [Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot). It provides a clear visual warning when durability is low, allowing you to monitor your essential gear in a vanilla-style interface without cluttered text or numbers. The widget's position and appearance are fully customizable via the configuration file.

**Required**: [ukulib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)  
**Recommended**: [Charm of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm-of-undying) and [Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot)  


**Credits**:
The original MOD by [BerdinskiyBear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berdinskiybears-armor-hud), forked by [uku](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukus-armor-hud), then forked by sheeta.
